description: Science Fiction Morphus table (Dark Designs pp. 50–53). Sci-fi fan or technophile features—armor, flight, energy weapons, sensors, and alien forms.

entries.name: Light Sci-Fi Armor
entries.description: Full high-tech environmental body armor or plated spacesuit with helmet; overlapping plates, mesh, or ceramic look.
customOneOffs: Environmentally sealed: no air required; immune to airborne irritants, toxins, and poison gases.
-5% to delicate-touch/precision skills (partially modeled above).

entries.name: Heavy Sci-Fi Armor
entries.description: Bulky head-to-toe environmental combat armor—mechanical, resin, or bio-engineered appearance; augments strength.
customOneOffs: Kinetic punches and kicks half damage (modeled in damageAffinities).
Sealed suit: no air required; immune to airborne irritants, toxins, and gases.
-20% delicate-touch/precision skills (partially modeled above).

entries.name: Flight Pack/Thrusters
entries.description: Jet pack, anti-gravity nodes, or organic thruster tubes—high-speed wingless flight (no hover).
customOneOffs: Flight speed 1D6x10+72 mph (57–90 mph); cannot hover.
+2 dodge in flight; +4 dodge at 60+ mph; +2 damage per 20 mph of speed.
+1 Horror Factor when flying.
Pack regens with Nightbane; one full day if destroyed; inoperable while regenerating.

entries.name: Energy Blaster
entries.description: Handheld or body-mounted futuristic energy weapon fueled by P.P.E. (1D6 damage per P.P.E., max 10 P.P.E. per attack).
customOneOffs: +3 to strike with energy blast attacks.
Range 2,000 ft (610 m); damage NOT magical or supernatural.
Reduce starting Talents by one.
Blast damage 1D6 per P.P.E. spent (max 10 P.P.E. per attack).

entries.name: Sci-Fi Melee Weapon(s)
entries.description: Futuristic melee weapon(s)—crystal, resin, or glowing tech; energize with P.P.E. for doubled damage (triple vs Nightlords/minions).
customOneOffs: Small weapon 1D6 / large 2D6 base; 3 P.P.E./melee (small) or 6 P.P.E./melee (large) doubles damage, triple vs Nightlords and demonic minions.
Appropriate W.P. granted in Morphus only; cannot be disarmed; others -6 strike/parry/disarm.
Do NOT add Supernatural P.S. or strength bonuses to energized damage.
+1 Horror Factor when energized.

entries.name: Universal Translator
entries.description: Earpiece, mask, mini-computer, or neck implant—understand and speak all languages at 98% fluency (no gesture/color-based languages).
customOneOffs: Understand and speak all languages at 98% (excluding non-lingual gesture/color components).
+5% Communications and Lore skills (partially modeled via radio skills).

entries.name: Sci-Fi Optics
entries.description: Helmet, goggles, visor, or cybernetic eyes—infrared/UV vision, light adjustment, combat targeting reticule.
customOneOffs: Infrared and ultraviolet vision; automatic light adjustment and polarization vs glare.
See heat signatures, engines, targets in smoke, thin walls, footprints <10 minutes old.
3 P.P.E.: see magically invisible 1 minute/level (1,000 ft range).
Virtual targeting reticule: +1 to strike with ranged weapons (strike bonus in statModifiers).

entries.name: Personal Scanner/Sensors
entries.description: Handheld or cybernetic scanner (1D4+1 features chosen from Bio-Scanner, EM Field, Geiger, Radar, Motion, Molecular, Sense Magic).
customOneOffs: -1D4 permanent P.P.E. per scan feature selected.
Bio-Scanner: +10% Medical, Interrogation, Intelligence; biometrics to 10 ft.
EM Field Detector: +10% Electrical skills; 50 ft range.
Geiger Counter: radiation warning 50 ft.
Miniature Radar: track 20 objects to 30 miles; +1 initiative, +1 strike flying or +2 dodge incoming; half blindness/darkness penalties.
Motion Detector: 100 ft; half blindness penalties; +1 dodge; no surprise from behind/above.
Molecular Analyzer: +10% Crime Scene Investigation and Chemistry; 25 ft, 20 ppm.
Sense Magic: ley lines, nexus, magic items, beings with 70+ P.P.E.; 30 ft.

entries.name: Hologram Projector
entries.description: Body-mounted hologram projector—3D light images up to 10 ft cube, 50 ft range; fools even magic-immune illusion resistance.
customOneOffs: Disguise and Camouflage at 80% or +20% (whichever is higher) when using the projector for concealment.
Five minutes of operation per hour; recharges from bio-kinetic energy.
Does not fool hearing, smell, touch, Sense Evil/Magic/Aura, pressure plates, or thermal optics; normal cameras record holograms.
-2 attacks/actions per melee and -10% Spd while projector and image are active.

entries.name: Force Field Array
entries.description: Energy nodes or suit patches project a form-fitting force field (1D6x10+200 S.D.C.); absorbs damage before personal S.D.C./H.P.
customOneOffs: Force field 1D6x10+200 S.D.C.; damage hits field first; regens with Nightbane healing; down 6 hours at 0 S.D.C.
Immune to gases, poison, and disease while field is up; protects kinetic and energy (incl. magical fireball/lightning).
Does NOT protect mesmerism, illusions, mind control, or possession.
Field must drop to cast spells/activate Talents (2D4 seconds vulnerable; no melee action to toggle).
Cannot develop Shadow Shield, Pipe Bomb, or similar magical protective-field Talents.

entries.name: Bug-Eyed Monster
entries.description: Classic monstrous alien (Grey, Mars Attacks, xenomorph-style, Gorn, cantina alien, etc.)—often rolled from Alien Shape, Biomechanical, or Extraterrestrial tables.
customOneOffs: Resemble a non-humanoid, monstrous sci-fi alien (oversized eyes, claws, antennae, etc.).
Player may roll or pick features from Alien Shape, Biomechanical, or Extraterrestrial Morphus tables for the specific look.
